news.title: Europe wants to rebalance trade with Beijing, but can't quit Chinese air conditioners
news.excerpt: An historic heat wave has driven unprecedented demand for Chinese-made air conditioners in Europe, underscoring the tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing.

news.title: Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix shares tumble over 7% as chip rout spreads from Wall Street
news.excerpt: Shares of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix plummeted more than 7% in early Thursday trading.

news.title: Oil falls as easing Middle East tensions send Brent to its worst quarter since 2020
news.excerpt: Oil prices fell more than 1% on Wednesday after talks between Washington and Tehran concluded.

news.title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
news.excerpt: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.

news.title: Inside India newsletter: Amazon, Walmart-owned Flipkart get ready to shake upIndia's delivery-in-minutes sector
news.excerpt: Amazon and Walmart-owned Flipkart are scrambling to expand quick commerce operations in India, not just to chase growth but to remain relevant to consumers.

news.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
news.excerpt: The Dow hit a record before closing marginally lower on Wednesday. Tune into CNBC Thursday at 5 p.m. ET for an exclusive interview with President Donald Trump.

news.title: Trump got $15,000 in FIFA tickets from Gianni Infantino. Next up: Presenting the World Cup trophy
news.excerpt: Trump’s ties to FIFA and Gianni Infantino face new scrutiny as the World Cup enters the knockout round and European lawmakers press over a Peace Prize complaint.

news.title: U.S. won’t renew USMCA, opening door for negotiations with Canada and Mexico
news.excerpt: President Donald Trump's "primary" issue with USMCA centers on America's trade deficits with Canada and Mexico, a senior administration official said.

news.title: Fed Chief Kevin Warsh declines to hint at July rate decision, but says inflation 'too high'
news.excerpt: The Fed chairman joined a panel of other central bank leaders Wednesday at the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal.

news.title: Employers who laid off workers citing AI are already starting to regret it
news.excerpt: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses

news.title: Trump Accounts for kids launch July 4: What parents need to know
news.excerpt: Here's a breakdown of how Trump Accounts work, who qualifies for free money and when the funds can be withdrawn.

news.title: Lamborghini reveals new Urus performance hybrid SUV after ditching EVs
news.excerpt: Lamborghini is calling the new Urus SE Performante the "fastest Super SUV in the world."

chatter.excerpt: Configure X API in digital.env to pull live cashtag chatter from FinTwit and finance spaces.

news.title: S&P 500 closes lower as tech stocks slide; SpaceX notches 3-day losing streak: Live updates
news.excerpt: The S&P 500 declined on Monday as tech shares tumbled.

news.title: SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally
news.excerpt: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past three days of trading.

news.title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
news.excerpt: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.

news.title: Wall Street was once uber bullish on gold. Now it's changing its tune
news.excerpt: The June Fed meeting set a hawkish tone. Now, several Wall Street firms don't believe gold will live up to their bullish targets.

news.title: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
news.excerpt: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.

news.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
news.excerpt: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.

news.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
news.excerpt: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the Persian Gulf loaded with oil.

news.title: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
news.excerpt: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.

news.title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
news.excerpt: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.

news.title: Clive Davis, music industry starmaker, has died at 94
news.excerpt: Davis launched or resurrected the careers of superstars such as Janis Joplin, Whitney Houston, Carlos Santana and Alicia Keys.

news.title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
news.excerpt: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.

news.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
news.excerpt: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
